name: Jenna Kruse, EMILY's List
subject: How we help protect clinics >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6130/24c69fd9/94cb4224/189d9d93/4102880988/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE955N_digital_email_20170927_EOQStateAttacks_inact&source=WQEFE955N_digital_email_20170927_EOQStateAttacks_inact")
---

Peter,

In 2008, North Dakota was the only state to have just one abortion provider.

Today, SIX states have only one abortion provider. And anti-choice Republicans are in a race to the bottom to make their state the first to close every last clinic.

The right to choose should not be based on your zip code. And the only way to protect this fundamental right is to oust extreme anti-choice Republicans and elect more pro-choice Democratic women at the state and local level.

**[Donate $3 to help meet our $250,000 End-of-Quarter goal so that we can elect leaders who will protect these vital clinics.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6130/24c69fd9/94cb4224/189d9d8c/4102880988/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170925_email_SeptEOQ-ns?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+meet+our+250000+EndofQu&utm_campaign=WQEFE955N_digital_email_20170927_EOQStateAttacks_inact&source=WQEFE955N_digital_email_20170927_EOQStateAttacks_inact")**

States are not only shutting down abortion clinics (which would be bad enough!), but they're also implementing bogus scare tactic laws to intimidate women who need to access the medical procedure.

Last month, Republican Texas Gov. Greg Abbott signed a bill into law banning insurance companies from covering abortion, requiring women to purchase additional "rape insurance." Texas Republicans are essentially asking women to pay for an extra insurance plan in case they are raped.

Hundreds of measures to restrict abortion have been passed since 2010, when Republicans took control of governors' seats and state legislatures across the country.

HUNDREDS.

That's why having more EMILY's List women at the state level _matters._

**Donate $3 to help reach our $250,000 goal, and help recruit the next generation of lawmakers to fight back where Republicans are continuing to limit abortion access:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Protect-Abortion-Rights](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6130/24c69fd9/94cb4224/189d9d8d/4102880988/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170925_email_SeptEOQ-ns?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgProtectAbortionR&utm_campaign=WQEFE955N_digital_email_20170927_EOQStateAttacks_inact&source=WQEFE955N_digital_email_20170927_EOQStateAttacks_inact")**

Thanks,

Jenna Kruse
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

name: Mark Warner
subject: Tim needs us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---

Derek,

I've known Tim Kaine for more than 30 years. Since the moment we met in law school, he's been almost singularly focused on improving people's lives through public service, first as a civil rights lawyer, then as mayor of Richmond. And I couldn't have asked for a better Lieutenant Governor during my term as Governor, or teammate in the U.S. Senate.

Together, we've worked to beat back attacks on our nation's health care system, fought for fair funding for education, and defended important programs like Social Security and Medicare. We need Tim in the Senate so he and I can keep fighting for all Virginians.

**But to get there, Tim 's going to need your help. Can you pitch in to help Tim's team hit their $70,000 end-of-quarter goal?**

| _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=yfIyCD2Z5ihRFOniGoJWpuhxfEMIcDvg)**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=4KTIprXlcQ%2FYquumNwHqEOhxfEMIcDvg)**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=7sr6zYaoM4p0anPyWAkfY%2BhxfEMIcDvg)**

**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ug1rIfpRhiahFQghFT%2Bd8%2BhxfEMIcDvg)**

This campaign is going to be hard. Tim's first opponent is already promising to run a "vicious, ruthless" campaign against him. He's going to spend as much time and money as he can between now and Election Day to try to drag this race into the mud and misrepresent Tim's strong record. And outside groups are going to do the same.

That's why every fundraising deadline is important from here on out. Tim needs to have the resources to defend himself from attacks and talk about the good work he's doing for all Virginians.

**[Will you chip in now to make sure Tim meets that $70,000 goal before the end-of-quarter deadline?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2FSivX87IULIMspgMjpt%2FdehxfEMIcDvg)**

Thank you,

Senator Mark Warner

subject: We're building for the future, Derek.
body:
Help Democrats win all over the country.
---
**Saturday is our end-of-quarter deadline. Pitch in $3 or whatever you can now to help Democrats compete and win.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052347b/4067b0a/3a7820dd4/7e626808/490278469/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/September-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170928_tp_nd&source=em_20170928_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170928_tp_nd")**
**
Derek --

This week's end-of-quarter deadline will decide a lot of budget questions around here.

But where it'll have the biggest impact is on our plans for next year's midterm elections, when we'll send a whole bunch of new Democrats to Congress to put a check on Donald Trump.

If we want to stop Trump -- not just in the short term, but for the rest of his presidency -- we must win back control of the House and Senate in 2018. That's what is on the line at fundraising deadlines like this. Will you chip in $3 or more right now?

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052347b/4067b0a/3a7820dd4/7e626812/490278469/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/September-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170928_tp_nd&source=em_20170928_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170928_tp_nd")
** A health care system that is affordable and inclusive. A ballot box that's accessible to every American who wants to vote. An infrastructure system that's secure and modern. An economy that is strong and fair to labor. Immigration policies that strengthen our economy and keep families intact -- instead of ripping them apart.

These are the priorities Americans want to see from Washington. But right now, this White House and Republican-led Congress are focused solely on undoing the progress made under President Obama, as if this was a team sport and not the fate of our country.

Our job is to do everything we can to stand in their way -- and that's exactly what we're doing this week as they try to take health care away from millions of families.

But we also need to make sure we're building for the future. One of my top priorities as Chair is constructing a strong party organization all across the country. The midterm elections are fast approaching, and they're the best chance we'll get to bring complete Republican control in Washington to an end.

**[Chip in $3 or more before Saturday's deadline to support Democrats -- and help invest in our campaign to take back Congress.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052347b/4067b0a/3a7820dd4/7e626813/490278469/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/September-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Chip+in+3+or+more+before+Saturdays+deadl&utm_campaign=em_20170928_tp_nd&source=em_20170928_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170928_tp_nd")**

Tom

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: The Fake News Media is misleading the American people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
I need you on my team now more than ever. |
---
| | | | | | | Peter,

No matter what the Fake News Media reports, we're working to advance our agenda _**every day**_.

In the first 9 months alone, we've delivered on our promises and have proven we're ready to fight for what we believe is right for the future of this great country.

**We did it together in 2016, and there 's no doubt in my mind we have the momentum to keep it going. But I need to know you're committed to our movement, Peter**.

name: The White House
subject: Unified Tax Reform Framework
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cf5305c8eb3f699711d6f3d9e3fd475a5864aadd77a92b18ac2f5d14580f5d38ecff9f3a655ec57359586f187cdc94160ae9abffefa31639

Recovery Operations in Puerto Rico and the U.S. Virgin Islands
President Donald J. Trump is committed to supporting the ongoing response and recovery operations in Puerto Rico and the U.S. Virgin Islands. FEMA search and rescue teams, as well as other federal agency partners, are working hard to provide relief and resources across the affected area. You can apply for FEMA assistance
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cf5305c8eb3f6997c49efa73890e437fe8d140719bf469f5dab1fef0187f575ab39f02e251d791a0906a54e44078e61d890c22f5ca0dfbbd
here if you have been affected.

Tax Reform

President Trump announced his Administration’s tax overhaul initiative at the Indiana State Fairgrounds yesterday afternoon. Four Indiana lawmakers accompanied the President on the trip - Republican Representatives Susan Brooks and Jackie Walorski, Republican Senator Todd Young and Democratic Senator Joe Donnelly. "Tax reform has not historically been a partisan issue – and it does not have to be a partisan issue today...” the President said. “There is no reason that Democrats and Republicans in Congress should not come together to deliver this giant win for the American people and begin the Middle Class Miracle once again."

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cf5305c8eb3f6997996c43c377e1bf13eb3bb92644f1f5cd8c65a3dba27d3369895cda747a3c85ce2ab59d5751f9d4569b2d1294edbc5765
Watch the Video

The Unified Tax Reform Framework

The America First tax relief plan will strengthen the middle class, grow the economy, and unleash America’s economic comeback. The plan consists of four main points: tax cuts for working Americans, a simpler tax code, lower business tax rates, and bringing wealth back to the United States. Here are a few of the measures included in President Trump’s tax relief plan:

- Double the standard deduction.
- Consolidate the seven existing tax brackets for taxable income to only three brackets: 12 percent, 25 percent, and 35 percent.
- Streamline the tax filing process to a single sheet of paper for most Americans.
- Reduce the corporate tax rate to 20 percent.
- Tax offshore profits at a one-time low tax rate, thereby ending the tax incentive to keep those profits offshore.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cf5305c8eb3f699788454e787e37cb4c23ef36d63192ec3691a8baf6f9188462ea51e034b58310e517e34707ae258a748a17fe243152da27
Read more

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump delivers remarks on tax reform | September 27, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS and VP TODAY

Today, President Trump will participate in the celebration of the 70th anniversary of the National Security Council. The President will then greet Vice Premier Liu Yandong of the People’s Republic of China. Vice President Mike Pence will be in Wisconsin and Michigan today to meet with business leaders and families to discuss the need for tax reform.

Coming Up

On Friday, President Trump will be delivering remarks to the National Association of Manufacturers in Washington, D.C.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cf5305c8eb3f6997f46692c2af981c5967681305edff7887d59c5d39513b6a13a3a41c375659ecece52b7a9033c3353d08636889b4a5ae3c
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cf5305c8eb3f69977b1205feb238b9eb354e5c9feef273cbca2ce38ca059435551885ae7c220d2483d1003f597833a8bf6bd55b894d18161
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4819bd81aa08ea7b1532735a4b2047893c3de84b6ac080f1c28be4e89e7ce575449700bb279a77a02de72bb72d33e1af1
Unsubscribe

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Looking to the future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek --

Over the course of the campaign I got to know Tim and Anne very well, and I can tell you that Tim is the kind of leader who always puts doing what's right and what's best for the families he serves above all else. That's rare in Washington these days, and it's why I'm so glad that Tim is running for reelection to the Senate.

I'll tell you something else about Tim: He won't let anyone push him around. When President Trump or his allies try to hurt Virginia families, like they did when they pushed a disastrous bill to take health care away from tens of millions of Americans, Tim will stand tall and fight hard for the people he represents. That's who he is.

**Let Tim know that you're proud to have him fighting for us in the Senate -- chip in today before the end-of-quarter deadline.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $15>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Q%2Bb2j7HpWQxchaxfwbUtkPY84sgwWtBt)**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=WMTDFzdHiARW23tUMeutSPY84sgwWtBt)**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=0DKLuTHLlO9N%2F%2FmLYydgsPY84sgwWtBt)**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=cbMvPX%2B%2FGnzMVLBGXI6gy%2FY84sgwWtBt)**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=dGm8WhLw05OsGw%2Fhxr1pKvY84sgwWtBt)**

In 2016, I was so proud to work together with Tim to propose the most progressive platform to help working families in our party's history. But that was nothing new for Tim. He's been fighting for what's right since his days as a member of the City Council in Richmond. If there was a problem, he'd roll up his sleeves and get the job done -- never for a moment forgetting who he was fighting for. It wasn't for the special interests; it was for the hard-working people of Richmond, of Virginia, and of our country.

name: Aisling Kerins, jayinslee.com
subject: After this month, we have to act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Governor Inslee isn't going to stop trying to make sure we are safe.

| [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTIwMjAxNTMS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI0MjM1Nzc1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) This month has not been easy, friend. Seeing the terrible impact that extreme weather is having on communities across the globe -- from Texas to Florida, to Puerto Rico, to my home state of Washington, to Africa and Asia -- has been heartbreaking. It's also made me more resolved than ever to act to combat climate change. And I hope it's done the same for you. That's why I'm so proud to be part of Jay Inslee's team along with you. Governor Inslee isn't just watching climate change endanger the lives of millions of people across the globe -- he is acting to stop it. But he can't do it alone. The movement for climate action is going to be hard. It's going to take the dedication of all of us. But you and I know that it's absolutely necessary. [**Jay Inslee is building a movement towards action. And he needs you now. Help us hit our goal of $10,000 by midn ight Saturday -- our public end-of-month deadline -- because we don't have any time to waste in fighting climate change.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTIwMjAxNTMS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI0MjM1Nzc1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) As President Trump has made it clear that he doesn't care _at all_ , Governor Inslee has stepped up to lead and redouble his efforts towards climate action. We have to be with him, redoubling our resolve as well. I believe more than ever that Governor Inslee is the leader we need on climate action. He is determined to ensure that we protect our Earth while creating a thriving clean energy economy and the new jobs that will come with it. He's a fighter. And, trust me, he won't ever give up. Your support will go a long way to prove our collective dedication to taking climate change head on: [**JayInslee.com/ClimateAction**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTIwMjAxNTMS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI0MjM1Nzc1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) I hope you will stand with Jay Inslee today. name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Opportunity in Alabama and Across the Electoral Map
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __ Friend,

On Tuesday night, Republicans in Alabama voted for Roy Moore to be their nominee for Senate, and the decision facing voters in the December 12th special election could not be clearer. While even fellow Republicans have said Moore is unfit to serve, Democratic nominee Doug Jones is a man of high character who has a proven record of independence and is unafraid to stand up for what is right for Alabama families.

Moore's victory represents a win for _Breitbart_ , Steve Bannon, and others associated with the Alt-Right movement. By contrast, Doug Jones is a former U.S. Attorney who successfully brought the KKK to justice for the awful 1963 bombing of the 16th Street Baptist Church in Birmingham, Alabama, that killed four beautiful little girls. The contrast could not be starker in this special election to fill the seat vacated by Jeff Sessions

The rise of the Alt-Right wing of the Republican Party is sending shock waves across the political landscape. On the same day that Moore won the Alabama Republican primary, Senator Bob Corker of Tennessee announced that he would not run for re-election. He too was being attacked from the right in his primary.

This split in the Republican party is creating new opportunities for Democratic Senate candidates in states where Democrats have had trouble competing. As the Chairman of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC), I can assure you that it is vital that we have the resources to compete everywhere in 2018 and take advantage of these opportunities.

[**I need your help to support our terrific candidates. Please donate now, before our critical end-of-quarter FEC filing deadline at midnight Saturday, to ensure Democrats like Doug Jones have the infrastructure to compete in seats across the nation >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bdb/70cdc2ba/46a349e7/397db8c/2406673889/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eoq917?refcode=em092817&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+I+need+your+help+to+support+our+terrific&utm_campaign=em092817&source=em092817")

Democrats face a tough map in 2018, but if we provide quality candidates like Doug Jones with the resources they need to compete, we have a strong chance of success.

Republicans are watching our fundraising numbers very closely as we approach the end-of-quarter FEC deadline on Saturday night. They know that we need resources to build effective campaigns. With strong numbers, we can force them to defend seats across the map and put ourselves in a position to succeed.

[**Our FEC deadline is only two days away - this Saturday at midnight. Donate before the deadline to ensure Senate Democrats have the resources we need to compete in Senate races across the country >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bdb/70cdc2ba/46a349e7/397db8d/2406673889/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eoq917?refcode=em092817&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Our+FEC+deadline+is+only+two+days+away++&utm_campaign=em092817&source=em092817")

Thank you for all that you do,
Chris Van Hollen

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

Friends,
Over the last few months I have been traveling across the country, and one of my greatest joys has been seeing the continued excitement and commitment to our magnificent movement. From Madison to Birmingham, your energy keeps the momentum surging. Being steadfast in our efforts is how we will transform this nation.
It truly does take teamwork to make the dream work, and seeing you show up to events in your official Bernie 2016 t-shirts, hats, and buttons further cements the passion and pride that links us together.
The team at Our Revolution is most appreciative of your efforts. We understand that we could not do the work of grassroots organizing without you. **[The donation of your time, treasure, and talent is growing this movement. Make a recurring monthly contribution in any amount today, and we will send you a free"Our Revolution" official t-shirt.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af61/bed43eb/1f92ac7/75ffd800/1527355501/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-eom?refcode=em170928-rc-send&recurring=true")**
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af61/bed43eb/1f92ac7/75ffd800/1527355501/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-eom?refcode=em170928-rc-send&recurring=true")
Whether you are attending a rally, march, local group meeting, or volunteering for our amazing candidates, you can show your support of Our Revolution and our shared values wherever you go.
From city council and school board races, to governorships and congressional offices, Our Revolution is making sure elected officials are accountable to people, not corporations or special interests. Your support is critical as we continue the work Senator Bernie Sanders began. **[Let people know our movement will continue far beyond 2016. Make a recurring monthly contribution and wear your official"Our Revolution" t-shirt with pride!](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af61/bed43eb/1f92ac7/75ffd800/1527355501/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-eom?refcode=em170928-rc-send&recurring=true")**
Change in this country doesn't come from the top. Change happens when all of us put a little 'extra' on our ordinary to ensure that extraordinary things happen. Thank you for being a part of this revolution.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution

body:
| | November elections will determine if our values will be protected or torn down.
---

| Dear Peter, **Critical elections are coming up all over the country. Now is not the time for Christians to sit on the sidelines.** It’s tempting to think the battle is won – that those in charge will protect our freedoms and values. But it’s not over. The fight for biblical principles is still waging. We must motivate Christians to put their faith into action at all levels of government! [Please, give now and help us mobilize Christians to vote their faith at the ballot box this November](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/mobilize_christians_to_vote_their_faith_this_november?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=170928_ea_s6&n=3&v=1086). There are over 2,000 elections taking place this fall in communities across the country. Elections have the power to effect real change. Our values will be protected or destroyed based off policies these new leaders enact. [Support My Faith Votes today to enable us to inspire more Christians to bring biblical values to the polling booth in important elections across the country!](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/mobilize_christians_to_vote_their_faith_this_november?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=170928_ea_s6&n=4&v=1086) Sincerely,

Jason Yates
CEO

| | _“If Senator Donnelly doesn’t approve it, because you know he’s on the other side, we will come here. We will campaign against him like you wouldn’t believe.”_
– President Donald J. Trump in Indianapolis, 9/27/17
President Donald Trump came to Indiana yesterday to talk about tax reform, but he also came to deliver a personal message...

_**President Trump is keeping a close eye on Democrat Donnelly. **_

Yes, it's not just Hoosiers, and it's not just Vice President Mike Pence who five days earlier delivered a similar message. Now we know for certain that the President of the United States is watching Democrat Joe Donnelly very closely, especially on the issue of federal tax reform.

But while that's great news, the real issue is this shouldn't be that hard! Respecting the will of Hoosiers, and supporting federal tax reform that simplifies the code, lowers rates and creates jobs by making America more competitive, shouldn’t take this much effort.

_**Democrat Donnelly could save us all the trouble by just supporting tax reform – today.**_ But he won’t. Why? Because he’s in the midst of election cycle waffling between his natural leanings toward his D.C. Democrat pals or siding with the Hoosiers he needs to win over by November of next year.
**[<<Make a Contribution to the Defeat Donnelly Fund>>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4be702cbca&e=1acd9bb3d6)**
**[<<Sign the Federal Tax Reform Petition>>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c6ab9cc3b7&e=1acd9bb3d6)**
<<Call Democrat Donnelly at 202-224-4814>>
**[<<Email Democrat Donnelly>>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8ef64f03e7&e=1acd9bb3d6)**
This isn’t the waffling routine of someone trying to make up their mind on policy. _**This is the waffling routine of a politician trying to decide what’s best for him politically. **_

And President Trump knows that. He knows that Democrat Donnelly is a politician who will cave to pressure. So what will you do to help Democrat Donnelly make the right choice so that Americans get much needed federal tax reform? You can send an [immediate contribution](https://indgop.us11.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8a7a0002e8&e=1acd9bb3d6) to our Defeat Donnelly Fund, [sign the White House's federal tax reform petition](https://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2e7734d00b&e=1acd9bb3d6), call Donnelly himself at 202-224-4814 or send him an email [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8feee0cdbd&e=1acd9bb3d6).

Democrat Donnelly knows President Trump is watching. Make sure he knows you're watching, too.

Sincerely,

Kyle Hupfer
Indiana Republican Party Chair

subject: A simple answer to a lot of questions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6127/24c69fd9/932a90fc/189d9457/1029840914/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE962N_digital_email_20170928_EOQGranholm_inact&source=WQEFE962N_digital_email_20170928_EOQGranholm_inact")
---

Peter,

"Elect women."

It's a simple phrase. But it's the answer to so many challenges we face.

How do you protect Planned Parenthood and the millions of patients who rely on them? **Elect women.**

How do you get laws that help families thrive, not just survive? **Elect women.**

How do you stop the disastrous agenda of Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, Paul Ryan, and their Tea Party crew? **Elect. Women.**

Electing women is what EMILY's List does best -- they helped me do it when I ran for governor of Michigan, becoming the first woman to serve in that office. And, over the last 32 years, they've helped elect a total of more than 900 women leaders.

But the work is never done, and it's more important than ever.

**[So let's help raise the $250,000 needed by the end of September to keep electing women-- pro-choice Democratic women, to be precise.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6127/24c69fd9/932a90fc/189d9450/1029840914/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170925_email_SeptEOQ-ns?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+So+lets+help+raise+the+250000+needed+by+&utm_campaign=WQEFE962N_digital_email_20170928_EOQGranholm_inact&source=WQEFE962N_digital_email_20170928_EOQGranholm_inact")**

Women make up nearly two-thirds of minimum wage earners. In households with kids, 40 percent of women are the primary or sole breadwinner.

And yet, women make up less than 20 percent of Congress and a mere quarter of state legislators.

We know outcomes are different when women are at the table. There's more cooperation, and more AND BETTER legislation gets passed.

This is why I will always answer when EMILY's List calls: Because I believe we need more women to run, and we must help more women win. And EMILY's List is better at it than anyone else.

**Donate $3 before September is over and help reach that big End-of-Quarter goal:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Reach-Our-EOQ-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6127/24c69fd9/932a90fc/189d9451/1029840914/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170925_email_SeptEOQ-ns?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReachOurEOQGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFE962N_digital_email_20170928_EOQGranholm_inact&source=WQEFE962N_digital_email_20170928_EOQGranholm_inact")**

Thank you for all you do for women who run,

Jennifer Granholm

How do you protect Planned Parenthood and the millions of patients who rely on them? Elect women. How do you get laws that help families thrive, not just survive? Elect women. How do you stop the disastrous agenda of Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, Paul Ryan, and their Tea Party crew? Elect. Women. Electing women is what EMILY's List does best -- they helped me do it when I ran for governor of Michigan, becoming the first woman to serve in that office. And, over the last 32 years, they've helped elect a total of more than 900 women leaders. But the work is never done, and it's more important than ever. "" Women make up nearly two-thirds of minimum wage earners. In households with kids, 40 percent of women are the primary or sole breadwinner. And yet, women make up less than 20 percent of Congress and a mere quarter of state legislators. We know outcomes are different when women are at the table. There's more cooperation, and more AND BETTER legislation gets passed. This is why I will always answer when EMILY's List calls: Because I believe we need more women to run, and we must help more women win. And EMILY's List is better at it than anyone else. name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I want to ask you to do something important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Just the other day, we defeated another attempt by Senate Republicans to take away health care from millions of Americans. Now let me be totally clear: If Republicans try again to repeal Obamacare, we will fight them with everything we have.
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170928-Sanders-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Sisters and Brothers --

Just the other day, we defeated another attempt by Senate Republicans to take away health care from millions of Americans.

Now let me be totally clear: If Republicans try again to repeal Obamacare, we will fight them with everything we have. We will not sit back and allow millions of Americans, some with life-threatening illnesses, to lose their lifelines to medical care. But let me also say that our ultimate goal is to go beyond the status quo. In the wealthiest country in the history of the world, health care must be a right, not a privilege, for every man, woman, and child. We must not pay the highest prices in the world for prescription drugs. And that is why I recently introduced, along with 16 other Democrats, a Medicare for All Single Payer bill.

As you know, there is growing disgust in this country with a Republican Party that is not only trying to decimate health care for millions, but wants to give tax breaks to billionaires and refuses to even acknowledge the reality of climate change. Right now, our job is to elect Democrats who have the courage to stand up to the billionaire class and fight for the 99 percent. Our job is to turn back Trump's reactionary agenda, and move this country forward in a progressive way.

So today, I want to ask you to do something important:

[**Make a $1 donation to Senate Democrats before this Saturday 's important FEC fundraising deadline.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170928-Sanders-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

One of the most significant realities of modern politics is just how successful the Koch brothers and like-minded billionaires have been at moving the Republican Party to the extreme right.

Ideas that were dismissed as downright crazy in 1980 -- like abolishing Medicaid, Medicare, and privatizing Social Security -- are now part of today's mainstream Republican thinking. Sometimes I wonder what world these people are living in.

But that is what we are up against, and it will take all of us coming together, people of all backgrounds, to defeat them next November.

[**Help Senate Democrats do that with your $1 donation before this important FEC fundraising deadline.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170928-Sanders-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Not only must we win elections in 2018, we must fight to make the Democratic Party a 50 state party. We can no longer abdicate dozens of states in this country to right-wing Republican extremists. We need to mobilize millions of Americans -- black, white, Latino, Asian-American, Native American -- at the grassroots level to create an economy and government which represents all of us, not just the one percent.

In solidarity,

Bernie Sanders

Now let me be totally clear: If Republicans try again to repeal Obamacare, we will fight them with everything we have. We will not sit back and allow millions of Americans, some with life-threatening illnesses, to lose their lifelines to medical care. But let me also say that our ultimate goal is to go beyond the status quo. In the wealthiest country in the history of the world, health care must be a right, not a privilege, for every man, woman, and child. We must not pay the highest prices in the world for prescription drugs. And that is why I recently introduced, along with 16 other Democrats, a Medicare for All Single Payer bill. As you know, there is growing disgust in this country with a Republican Party that is not only trying to decimate health care for millions, but wants to give tax breaks to billionaires and refuses to even acknowledge the reality of climate change. Right now, our job is to elect Democrats who have the courage to stand up to the billionaire class and fight for the 99 percent. Our job is to turn back Trump's reactionary agenda, and move this country forward in a progressive way. So today, I want to ask you to do something important: "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" One of the most significant realities of modern politics is just how successful the Koch brothers and like-minded billionaires have been at moving the Republican Party to the extreme right. Ideas that were dismissed as downright crazy in 1980 -- like abolishing Medicaid, Medicare, and privatizing Social Security -- are now part of today's mainstream Republican thinking. Sometimes I wonder what world these people are living in. But that is what we are up against, and it will take all of us coming together, people of all backgrounds, to defeat them next November. name: Scott Arceneaux
subject: This is the only possible way
body:
#
Team --
Yesterday we reached out to you about an incredible victory in Florida, won with a bold progressive platform, small dollar donors, and a massive grassroots voter contact strategy.
Today I want to talk with you about what that means for our campaign. Here's what we have so far:
✅ A bold progressive platform, including strong support for Medicare for All, welcoming immigrants and refugees, universal preschool, and more.
✅ A massive grassroots voter contact strategy
✅ A dedicated candidate who is willing to put in the work necessary to win
Here's what we need more of:
✅ Small dollar donors to fuel our movement
So far, we have the most small dollar donors in the race, and we're going to need even more support from activists and advocates like you, who care about the future of Florida.
[**Can we count on you to chip in to our campaign before our critical end-of month deadline?**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb328e/9e00690/4f747f63/24036bf2/388503605/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-sept2017?refcode=em170928-sa")
We know this is a winning formula -- we saw that for certain on Tuesday night, when we had a progressive victory in a special election down in South Florida. But the only possible way it works is if you're willing to join us in giving this campaign your all.
I hope we can count on you. I'm excited to see what we can accomplish together in the coming months.
Bring it home,
Scott Arceneaux

**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c242d/7377f838/345423dc/51fb9d65/948614583/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sepeoq?express_lane=true&refcode=20170928.2nd")**
**I can 't tell you how important it is that we meet this goal, Peter.** We started off this quarter strong by announcing Joe's campaign for re-election and traveling around the state during the RV tour talking to people about what really matters to them. But, our work is far from over. We need to _finish_ this quarter strong, too, and we only have one day to do it.

Re-electing Joe means Hoosiers keep a fighter for them in the Senate. Joe protects the middle class -- not the mega-rich -- even when it comes at a political cost to him. Every time we've needed him to stand up to Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans he's done it. That commitment is why Republicans and their special interest friends want him gone. **If we fall behind in this race, all of our progress could be lost.**

Winning this campaign and sending Joe back to the Senate to fight for Hoosiers is going to take investment from every day, every month, and every quarter from now until Election Day. And the stakes are high.

Joe's always had our backs, and now it's time we have his.

**[Will you chip in to our end-of-quarter goal and make sure we can send Joe back to the Senate to fight for Hoosiers?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c242d/7377f838/345423dc/51fb9d64/948614583/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sepeoq?refcode=20170928.2nd&amount=10") We're just 84 supporters away from meeting our 400-donor goal and unlocking our donor match.**

I'll be reporting these numbers to Joe, and I want to give him some good news.

Thanks for everything,

Kelly

Team --

Extreme right-wing candidate Roy Moore won the Republican runoff election to fill Jeff Sessions' Senate seat.

With Moore as the GOP nominee, our chances to flip this Senate seat just got stronger -- but only if we help Democratic nominee Doug Jones kick off the general election with the strongest campaign possible. Are you in?

[**Chip in $1 right now to elect Democrat Doug Jones and Democratic Senate candidates everywhere, starting with the Alabama Senate special election.**](http://action.dscc. A recent _Washington Post_ op-ed called Roy Moore an "alt-right hero." He's been endorsed by Steve Bannon and _Breitbart_ , and his victory this week sets a dangerous precedent for other extremist candidates to run in 2018.

If we help Doug win this seat, it will send an unmistakable message that Democrats can compete and win anywhere -- especially against far-right extremists. This Alabama special election is right around the corner, so let's make sure Doug has the resources necessary to compete.

**We need to give Doug the strongest possible start to the general election. Chip in $1 right now to elect Doug Jones and Democratic Senate candidates everywhere:**

Team DSCC
